refnamediv.refpurpose: Sample a 3D volume along a polyline.

listitem.para: N-by-3 polyline points as [x y z] volume coordinates.
Sampled volume values along the profile.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Samples a volume along an N-by-3 sequence of [x y z] points using nearest-neighbor samples and returns the coordinates and values.

refsection.title: Examples
